name: APT28
description: APT28 is a Russian military intelligence (GRU Unit 26165) cyber espionage group active since at least 2004. Known for targeting government, military, and security organizations primarily in NATO countries. Notable operations include the 2016 DNC hack, Olympic Destroyer, and ongoing campaigns against European governments. Uses spear phishing, zero-day exploits, and credential harvesting extensively.
infrastructure: Uses spear phishing domains mimicking legitimate services (webmail, cloud storage). Operates through compromised routers and VPN appliances. Known for registering typosquatting domains. Uses OAuth token phishing.
